audio_identity.overall_style: Traditional Japanese fighting game aesthetic with emphasis on weapon-based combat audio

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Samurai Shodown (SNES) page
notes: SNES port of arcade game developed by Monolith Corp. Published by Takara. Released September 22, 1994 (JP) / September 14, 1994 (US). Composer identified as Yasuo Yamate (also credited as Tate Norio) for the series. Specific tempo, key, chord progression, and per-area SFX data not documented in provided sources. Music characterized by traditional Japanese instruments per series documentation.
